title: Kaworu Question
wikitext:
[]: Kaworu Question (POSSIBLE SPOILERS)             Quote Post by Nihbiels » Fri Jul 17, 2009 2:09 pm The Moon has almost no atmosphere. How is Kaworu able to speak and how does his plugsuit make a noise? Could he possibly be using his AT Field to create an artificial atmosphere or is there some sort of dome I'm unaware of?

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Fri Jul 17, 2009 2:11 pm He is made out of PWM ( in rebuild i jope too) therefore there is no need for food/air etc..(like Rei in theory)

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Fri Jul 17, 2009 2:27 pm You're talking about Neon Genesis Evangelion , and you can't get past the "okay guys 90% of traditional sci-fi uses noise in space for dramatic liberty even though it shouldn't be there; you'll live with it" phase? Good grief. As far as the lack of oxygen goes, being an alien has natural benefits.

[]:             Quote Post by Nihbiels » Fri Jul 17, 2009 2:29 pm It's not his survival on the Moon, but his ability to speak and carry sounds in a vacuum that puzzles me. Sound can't exist if there is no medium for it to travel through. Maybe somehow being composed of PWM he is able to negate this or speak using a different medium such as light.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Fri Jul 17, 2009 2:38 pm If it's any consolation I don't think Gendo and Fyutsuki heard him. He probably just mouthed the words and the sound was his thoughts (it's hard to lip-read anime...). I wouldn't bother mulling over this problem, not when 2.0 gave us so many others.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Fri Jul 17, 2009 2:38 pm It's an anime, don't think too much. And we can find tons of imaginary answers. No big deal. Try to figure out why ships are noisy in StarWars.

[]:             Quote Post by Maximilian » Fri Jul 17, 2009 3:32 pm As for the whole noise in space thing, I noticed that only scenes with Kaworu have sound (that are in space). There are no "whooshes" when spaceships move, for instance.

[]:             Quote Post by Barong » Fri Jul 17, 2009 3:36 pm Maximilian wrote: As for the whole noise in space thing, I noticed that only scenes with Kaworu have sound (that are in space). There are no "whooshes" when spaceships move, for instance.

[]:             Quote Post by Maximilian » Fri Jul 17, 2009 3:46 pm Barong wrote: Because he only thought all that noise and lines, yep, even the "swooosh" of the plugsuit. The guy is super sensitive when it comes to the detailz.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Fri Jul 17, 2009 4:08 pm It's his gay angel powers. With those on his side, anything is possible.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jul 18, 2009 2:33 pm Kaworu can do whatever the fuck he wants. Number One rule of Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sat Jul 18, 2009 2:48 pm schismatics wrote: It's his gay angel powers. With those on his side, anything is possible.

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Sat Jul 18, 2009 2:51 pm @ OP, so is this a problem for you ? how about the missibles being launched at the thing the came from space, and exploding on his at field ? bah....such useless thread

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Sat Jul 18, 2009 2:54 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: schismatics wrote: It's his gay angel powers. With those on his side, anything is possible.

[]:             Quote Post by GothGirl95 » Fri Jan 20, 2012 10:49 am Well, lets not forget he's an Angel after all and he has a lot of abilities, such as the ones in NGE episode 24 and in EOE. There are a lot of things he did that no other human, in existence, can do. He's powers so far: - levitation (a power with which a person/object can fly, without the need of wings) - i suppose you already know that Kaworu can fly (episode 24) - telepathy (the power to communicate between people/objects through thoughts, feelings, desires, etc.) - this can be seen when Kaworu is talking to Lilith, using telepathy (episode 24) - telekinesis (the power to move objects using thoughts, without touching them physically) - this can be seen when Kaworu opens the door to the place, where Lilith is, with just looking and not touching the door (episode 24) - Kaworu is also able to create an AT Field *Message me if there are other powers I haven't mentioned. And I guess he probably has more powers from where these came from. So now you see that just because he can breathe and talk in space is probably another (new) power of his'.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Fri Jan 20, 2012 7:44 pm Now lets keep in mind that we don't know the extent of Mark 6s power, what if Kaworu doesnt have that much power in his abilities at all and they are actually amplified by the Mark 6, I do believe that he hasnt been seen not touching Mk6

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Fri Jan 20, 2012 7:52 pm GothGirl95 wrote: *Message me if there are other powers I haven't mentioned.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Jan 20, 2012 7:53 pm How did Indiana Jones survive a nuclear blast with a refrigerator? Nobody knows, but nobody really cares. In fiction, the physics of reality don't really apply.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Fri Jan 20, 2012 10:08 pm The list of powers from GothGirl95 and Jornophelanthas are impressively researched, but aren't they all based on NGE/EoE and thus should not be taken for granted as such in NME? Many assume he is an Angel in NME, but I am not sure we even have a definitive proof on this.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Jan 20, 2012 10:17 pm schismatics wrote: It's his gay angel powers. With those on his side, anything is possible.
summary:
[]: Kaworu Question (POSSIBLE SPOILERS)             Quote Post by Nihbiels » Fri Jul 17, 2009 2:09 pm The Moon has almost no atmosphere. How is Kaworu able to speak and how does his plugsuit make a noise? Could he possibly be using his AT Field to create an artificial atmosphere or is there some sort of dome I'm unaware of?

[]:             Quote Post by Ramiel² » Fri Jul 17, 2009
